code: import React from'react';import'./TransferProgress.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TransferProgress=_ref=>{let{activeTransfers}=_ref;if(!activeTransfers||activeTransfers.length===0)return null;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"transfer-panel card fade-in",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"transfer-panel-title",children:"Active Transfers"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"transfer-list",children:activeTransfers.map(transfer=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"transfer-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"transfer-info",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"transfer-filename",title:transfer.fileName,children:transfer.fileName}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"transfer-percentage",children:[Math.round(transfer.progress),"%"]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"progress-bar-container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"progress-bar-fill ".concat(transfer.type==='upload'?'uploading':'downloading'),style:{width:"".concat(transfer.progress,"%")}})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"transfer-meta",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:[transfer.type==='upload'?'⬆️ Uploading to':'⬇️ Downloading from'," ",transfer.peerName||'Network']}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:transfer.speed||'Calculating...'})]})]},transfer.id))})]});};export default TransferProgress;
